backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing player state (health, position, score) with functions for spawning, position updates, damage, and querying player data stored in a Map keyed by Principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five mobile responsiveness features including viewport configuration, touch controls, device detection, responsive HUD, and viewport meta tags.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing routing, pages, components, hooks, and styling for a 3D battle royale game with mobile support.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes and base styles for background, foreground, and border colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with mobile-optimized viewport meta tag (no user scaling) and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining root, home (/), and game (/game) routes with RouterProvider as the main app component.
frontend/src/components/GameHUD.tsx: Responsive heads-up display showing health bar, score, exit button, weapon display (hidden on mobile), and adaptive control instructions based on device type.
frontend/src/components/GameWorld.tsx: React Three Fiber scene with sky, lighting, ground plane, animated spawn markers, cover objects, and PlayerController integration with camera positioning.
frontend/src/components/PlayerController: Manages first-person player movement and camera controls for both desktop (WASD + pointer lock) and touch devices (virtual joystick), integrating weapon shooting and position updates to the backend.
frontend/src/components/TouchControls.ts: Renders mobile/tablet UI overlay with a virtual joystick for movement (bottom-left), fire button (bottom-right), and camera control hint; only displays on touch devices.
frontend/src/components/WeaponSystem.tsx: Renders a 3D weapon model attached to the camera with subtle bob animation and a muzzle flash light effect that triggers when shooting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the Internet Computer backend actor with authentication, automatically recreating it when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeviceDetection.ts: Detects device type (touch/mobile/tablet/desktop) based on touch capability and screen dimensions, updating on resize and orientation changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking using AuthClient with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerMovement.ts: Manages local player position state and throttles backend position updates to once per second to reduce network calls.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerSpawn.ts: Handles initial player spawn by selecting a random spawn point and calling the backend spawn mutation, managing spawn state and errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including player state, spawning, position updates, damage, and fetching all players with appropriate polling intervals.
frontend/src/hooks/useTouchControls.ts: Custom React hook that manages touch input for mobile devices, handling joystick movement on the left side of the screen, camera rotation via touch drag, and shooting triggers with normalized coordinate outputs.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeaponControls.ts: Custom React hook that manages weapon shooting state with a fire rate limiter (200ms between shots) and provides a shoot callback function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, and base styles for full-screen canvas rendering with touch-action disabled.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx: Main game page component that renders a Three.js Canvas with GameWorld, overlays GameHUD and TouchControls, and displays a centered crosshair for aiming.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component with hero banner, game description, feature cards, and a login/play button that integrates Internet Identity authentication before navigating to the game.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color variables, border radius tokens, shadow utilities, and animation keyframes for UI components.
project_state.json: Project metadata file tracking implemented features, requirements, architectural notes, and version history for a web-based battle royale shooter game with mobile support.
